name: stability-ai
description: Generate images with Stable Diffusion models and check engines, account, and credit balance via the Stability AI API

envVars.name: STABILITY_API_KEY
envVars.description: Stability AI API key (starts with sk-)

tools.name: List Engines
tools.description: List the generation engines (models) available to your account

tools.name: Get Balance
tools.description: Get the credit balance of your Stability AI account

tools.name: Get Account
tools.description: Get profile and organization details for the account that owns the API key

tools.name: Text to Image
tools.description: Generate images from a text prompt with a Stable Diffusion engine (consumes credits)

engine_id.description: Generation engine ID (see List Engines), e.g. stable-diffusion-xl-1024-v1-0

accept.description: Response format: application/json returns base64-encoded image artifacts; image/png returns raw bytes

text_prompts.description: Prompt objects with text and optional weight (negative prompts use a negative weight), e.g. [{"text":"a lighthouse at dawn","weight":1}]

cfg_scale.description: How strictly the diffusion process adheres to the prompt (0-35)

width.description: Image width in pixels (must be an allowed dimension for the engine)

height.description: Image height in pixels (must be an allowed dimension for the engine)

style_preset.description: Style preset, e.g. photographic, digital-art, anime, cinematic

prompts.title: Generate an image
prompts.prompt: Generate an image with Stability AI from a prompt I provide and show me the seed used.

prompts.title: Check my credits
prompts.prompt: Check my Stability AI credit balance and list the engines available to my account.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Stability AI API Setup

steps.title: Create a Stability AI account
steps.description: Sign up at https://platform.stability.ai — new accounts receive 25 free credits, enough to test image generation.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Open https://platform.stability.ai/account/keys and copy your API key (starts with sk-). Create a dedicated key per application if you prefer.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Add it to your .env file as STABILITY_API_KEY=sk-...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Get Balance tool to confirm the key works, then List Engines and try Text to Image with a simple prompt.

notes: Image generation is billed in credits per image — buy credits at https://platform.stability.ai/account/credits
Text to Image defaults the Accept header to application/json so images return as base64 artifacts (each with its seed and finishReason)
The newer v2beta Stable Image endpoints require multipart/form-data uploads and are not exposed here; tools use the JSON v1 generation API (SDXL)
